description.ko: 데이터와 빗줄기가 색채의 교향곡으로 어우러지는 홀로그램 폭풍 속 미래 대도시의 고독하고 수직적인 풍경입니다.
description.en: A lonely, vertical perspective of a futuristic metropolis during a holographic storm, where data and rain merge into a chromatic symphony.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Silicon Monsoon.' A panoramic view of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity where towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are saturated with #FF00FF magenta holographic advertisements. A torrential digital rain creates #00FFFF cyan pixelated ripples on wet metallic asphalt, reflecting the city's vertical scale. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, capturing the urban romanticism of a neon-soaked future.
